rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Recepta Varia' confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini's 'Recepte Varia' misread the 'a' as 'e'.
Row present in image, correctly identified by gemini-flash as column labels. gpt-5-mini missed this distinct header row.

rows.description: 1766. Jany 9. Recd of Mr. Lexton of Leatherhead first Paymt of Dr Shortridge Benefaction for 1765.
rows.notes: Monetary amounts are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash for minor punctuation and abbreviation accuracy ('Paymt').
rows.english_description: First payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Lexton of Leatherhead.
rows.english_description_with_amount: First payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Lexton of Leatherhead, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: April 19. Recd of Mr Jackson Ballance of acct for Merton Estate for ye year from Mich: 1764 to Mich: 1765.
rows.notes: Monetary amounts consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description combined: 'Ballance' (gemini-flash) and 'ye year' (gpt-5-mini) confirmed by image.
rows.english_description: Annual account payment received from Mr Jackson Ballance for the Merton estate for the year Michaelmas 1764 to Michaelmas 1765.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual account payment received from Mr Jackson Ballance for the Merton estate for the year Michaelmas 1764 to Michaelmas 1765, amounting to £160 14s 9d.

rows.description: 30 Recd. of Dr. Seay Mr. Mullett Plate Money
rows.notes: Monetary amounts confirmed across both extractors. Description for 'Dr. Seay' confirmed visually, gemini-flash was correct. Gpt-5-mini's note was good for identifying ambiguity, but its reading 'Dr Beag' was less accurate.
rows.english_description: Plate money received from Mr Mullett (entry recorded by Dr Seay).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received from Mr Mullett (entry recorded by Dr Seay), amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.description: May 31. Recd. of Mr. Lexton second Payment of Dr. Shortridge Benefaction for 1765.
rows.notes: Monetary amounts consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash for minor punctuation accuracy. Both extractors correctly omitted the curly brace linking to the previous entry.
rows.english_description: Second payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Lexton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Lexton, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: July 12. Recd. of Mr. Newbury Grant Fees ---
rows.notes: Monetary amounts consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash ('Newbury Grant Fees ---') as it is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's reading ('Newbery Dean Fees').
rows.english_description: Grant fees received from Mr Newbury.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Grant fees received from Mr Newbury, amounting to £9 10s 10d.

rows.description: 19 Recd. of Mr. Tonklin Bursar Midsmr. Interest
rows.notes: Monetary amounts consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed, including the 3/4 fraction. Description adopted from gemini-flash ('Tonklin Bursar Midsmr. Interest') as it is a more accurate reading than gpt-5-mini's.
rows.english_description: Interest received at Midsummer from Mr Tonklin, the bursar.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interest received at Midsummer from Mr Tonklin, the bursar, amounting to £51 19s 0.75d.

rows.description: Oct 10. Recd. The first Payment of Dr. Shortridge Benefaction for 1766. Due at Xmas last 1765
rows.notes: Monetary amounts consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash, as 'Xmas last' is visually correct compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Allhallow last'. Both correctly disregarded the curly brace as part of the description text itself, though it visually links the date.
rows.english_description: First payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction for 1766, noted as having been due at the previous Christmas (1765).
rows.english_description_with_amount: First payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction for 1766, noted as having been due at the previous Christmas (1765), amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash ('Onslows Plate Money ---') as it is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's reading ('Ouslow Plate Money').
rows.english_description: Plate money received from Mr Onslow.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received from Mr Onslow, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts visually verified. Pounds, pence, and fraction are clear and agreed. Shillings is visually confirmed as '4' (gemini-flash) rather than '1' (gpt-5-mini) due to the distinct top loop of the digit in the image.
Pounds confirmed across both extractors. Shillings, pence, and fraction visually confirmed as '1', '11', and '1/4' respectively, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's reading for these was incorrect.
Monetary amounts are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed.
Monetary amounts are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed.

Visually confirmed as a single 'total' row with description and amounts on the same line. Amounts (pounds, shillings, pence) and fraction (0.75) are clear and match gemini-flash. Description 'Deb: anni procedentes' confirmed visually, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two rows, misread 'anni' as 'cum', and misread the fraction as 0.25.

Pounds and shillings confirmed across both extractors. Description, pence, and fraction visually confirmed as 'Summa Receptorium', '1', and '1/4' respectively, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's readings for these fields were incorrect.
